raw.message:
RUNNER ROULETTE IS LIVE.. Pick your horse the right way 🔥
Spin the Runner Roulette and get your Grand National horse 🐎
💰 Also win a share of £5,000
🎟️ FREE to enter
Will your runner bring it home? 👀
T&Cs apply | 18+ Gamble responsibly

hook.summary: A roulette wheel featuring horse racing silks spins to reveal a potential winner for a giveaway.
hook.visual_action: A spinning wheel with various horse racing silks slows down and stops on a specific runner.
hook.text_overlay: RUNNER ROULETTE THE £5K GRAND NATIONAL GIVEAWAY FREE TO ENTER

scene_flow: The 'Runner Roulette' wheel begins spinning, showcasing the £5K Grand National Giveaway.
The wheel cycles through various horse racing silks, building anticipation.
The wheel lands on a specific red and white striped silk.
A 'SIGN UP HERE' call-to-action button appears at the bottom of the screen.
audience_proxy: Adult sports betting enthusiasts and horse racing fans interested in the Grand National.
